nasb.text: Ephraim feeds on wind, And pursues the east wind continually; He multiplies lies and violence. Moreover, he makes a covenant with Assyria, And oil is carried to Egypt.

esv.text: Ephraim feeds on the wind and pursues the east wind all day long; they multiply falsehood and violence; they make a covenant with Assyria, and oil is carried to Egypt.

cnv.text: “以法蓮吃風， 整天追趕東風， 增添虛謊和強暴。 他們與亞述結盟， 又給埃及送油。”

ccb.text: “以法莲以风为食， 整天追逐东风， 虚谎和暴力日益增多； 他跟亚述结盟， 向埃及进贡橄榄油。”
